seo.indexTitle: Gastro Master – More Profit Through Direct Orders
seo.indexDescription: Your own webshop & app for the restaurant industry. 0% commission. More direct orders. 800+ happy clients.

heroScroll.subPrefix: Gastro Master gives you full control —
heroScroll.subSuffix: pickup screen and more. All in one. No hidden fees.

hero.headline: Stop Paying Commission on Your Own Revenue.
hero.sub: Your own branded online shop & app — so customers order directly from you. Zero platform fees. More profit from day one.

problem.sub: Every order through Deliveroo, Uber Eats, or Just Eat costs you money. You take the risk, do the work — and a huge chunk of your revenue goes straight to the platform.
items: You pay up to 30% commission — on your own revenue.
Your customer data belongs to the platform, not you.
You're just one of thousands of competing listings.
You have zero control over pricing, marketing or visibility.
Your margins shrink while the platform keeps growing.

solution.sub: With Gastro Master you get a complete ordering system under your own brand — with 0% commission on every single order.

features.title: Your Own Webshop
features.text: Your branding, your domain, your design — fully customised to your restaurant.

features.title: Your Own App
features.text: Native iOS & Android app on the App Store & Google Play with push notifications.

features.title: Your Own Payments
features.text: PayPal, Stripe, card payments — you stay in full control of your money.

features.title: Your Brand, Front & Centre
features.text: No platform logo. Customers order from you — not from a marketplace.

diff.headline: Why Gastro Master?
diff.sub: We're not just another software vendor. We're your dedicated partner — with real support, flexibility and complete control in your hands.

features.title: WhatsApp Support
features.text: A dedicated point of contact — no ticket queues, no waiting.

features.title: Phone Support
features.text: Call us whenever you need help. A real person answers.

features.title: Pay Only After Launch
features.text: Your first payment isn't due until your system is live.

features.title: PayPal & Stripe Setup
features.text: We handle the full payment provider setup for you.

features.title: Full Control
features.text: Your logins, your data, your payments — always.

positioning.sub: Delivery platforms cost you thousands every month in commissions. Every direct order through your own shop is pure profit that stays with you.

items.title: The Platform Always Takes a Cut
items.text: Every Deliveroo or Uber Eats order costs you 15–30% in commission. That's your profit — and you've earned it.

items.title: Same Effort, Lower Margins
items.text: You cook, you deliver, you take the risk — but the platform profits from every order. It doesn't have to be this way.

items.title: Direct Orders = Pure Profit
items.text: Every order through your own shop stays 100% with you. No commission. No dependency. More profit per order.

process.headline: Our Process
process.sub: From your first conversation to a fully live system — we guide you personally through every single step.

steps.title: Free Strategy Call
steps.text: Get in touch — we'll learn about your restaurant and give you honest, no-obligation advice.

steps.title: Strategy & Planning
steps.text: Together we plan your setup: webshop, app, POS — tailored exactly to your business.

steps.title: Menu & Setup
steps.text: Send us your menu and details — we handle the entire setup from start to finish.

steps.title: Your System Goes Live
steps.text: Typically live within 2–3 weeks — fully set up and ready to take orders.

trust.headline: 800+ Restaurants Trust Gastro Master
trust.sub: From single-location independents to multi-brand chains — Gastro Master is the ordering system for restaurants that want to own their success.

references.headline: Real results from restaurants that made the switch.

items.name: TAKE – The Good Food
items.quote: Since switching to Gastro Master, we've seen significantly more direct orders. The app and webshop work flawlessly — and the personal support is worth its weight in gold.

items.name: Pizzeria Il Sorriso
items.quote: Finally — no more platform commissions. Setup was fast and smooth. We can't recommend Gastro Master enough.

items.name: Kojo Sushi
items.quote: Our customers now order directly through our app. It saves us real money every month and we have full control over our business.

momentum.headline: 5 Years of Momentum
momentum.sub: From our first client to our own payment system — we're building the future of the restaurant industry.
momentum.outro: We're forward-thinking, agile and building software that genuinely moves restaurants forward.

transaktion.headline: Protect Your Margins with Transaction Pass-Through
transaktion.sub: Strategically pass on payment fees to customers — and protect every euro of your margin. Your own PayPal and Stripe account, full control over your money.
features: You keep full control over your revenue
Strategically pass payment fees to customers
More payment methods without losing margin
transaktion.calcNote: → With the Transaction Pass-Through add-on, you can pass these fees on strategically.
transaktion.feeStripe: Stripe (Apple Pay, Google Pay, Visa, MC, Klarna): 1.5% + €0.25 per order

pricing.headline: From First Steps to Complete Solution.
pricing.sub: Clear plans. Clear differences. Choose the model that fits your business.
pricing.setupNote: All prices excl. VAT. One-time setup fee from €400–€1,600 net depending on scope. Payment fees (PayPal / Stripe) charged separately. Hardware and special requirements discussed individually.

faq.sub: Still have questions? Find your answers here — or just give us a call.

items.q: How quickly can I get started?
items.a: Your shop is typically live within a few weeks. We handle setup, design and configuration for you.

items.q: Do I have to pay upfront?
items.a: No. Your first payment isn't due until your system is live. There are no costs beforehand.

items.q: Do you help set up PayPal and Stripe?
items.a: Yes — we handle the complete setup of your payment providers, including verification.
Via WhatsApp, phone or email. You have a dedicated personal contact — no anonymous ticket system.

items.q: Am I locked into a long contract?
items.a: No. You can cancel at any time with 3 months' notice. No long-term lock-in.

items.q: What if I'm switching from another provider?
items.a: We make switching as easy as possible — including 50% off while your old subscription is still running.

items.q: Can I add a POS system later?
items.a: Yes, at any time. Gastro Master offers everything from one place — shop, app and POS.

contact.headline: Ready to Unlock More Profit?
contact.sub: Let us show you in a free strategy call how Gastro Master drives more direct orders and puts more money back in your pocket.
contact.success: Thank you! We'll be in touch shortly.

contact.seoTitle: Contact — Free Consultation for Restaurateurs | Gastro Master
contact.seoDesc: Contact Gastro Master — free consultation for restaurateurs. Online shop, app, POS system and website for gastronomy. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
contact.heroTitle: Book your free initial consultation now
contact.heroSub: In a free initial consultation, one of our experts will present Gastro Master in detail and address your questions.
contact.submitBtn: Yes, I'd like to be contacted

founder.sub: Not an anonymous software vendor — a dedicated team of 30+ professionals who support you personally every step of the way.
founder.langSub: Our consulting is personal, direct and linguistically close to your everyday life. We speak your language — so you feel understood from day one.

rene.bio: After completing his Bachelor's in International Business Management, he chose the entrepreneurial path. His focus is on growth, sales and strategic market development.

sanjaya.bio: Long-standing IT specialist with experience in technology and leadership roles at globally leading companies including Procter & Gamble. Focused on product, systems and scalable technology.

salvatore.bio: Several years of sales experience. Previously in luxury watch sales at a leading online retailer such as CHRONEXT — and knows that every single detail matters.

andrej.bio: Previously in management positions in food retail, including at Rewe. Brings solid experience in customer service and operational organisation.

mohammad.bio: Former restaurateur who found his way onto the team through his own positive experience as a customer. He knows the industry's challenges first-hand.

target.headline: Your Business. Your Solution.
target.sub: Whether it's a pizzeria, franchise or ghost kitchen — find the model that fits your business perfectly.

content.title: More Profit Per Delivery
content.subtitle: Your own ordering channel — zero platform commission
content.text: With your own webshop and app you reach customers directly. No commissions, full control over your delivery business.

content.title: One System for All Locations
content.subtitle: Central control, local flexibility
content.text: Manage multiple locations through a single dashboard. Consistent branding, central menu management and individual adjustments per site.

content.title: Maximum Margin Without a Storefront
content.subtitle: Delivery-first — without platform dependency
content.text: As a ghost kitchen, every cent counts. Your own ordering system cuts out high platform commissions and builds direct customer relationships.

content.title: Your Shop — Now Online Too
content.subtitle: Click & collect and direct orders
content.text: Give your customers a modern online ordering experience. Perfect for delis, butchers, drinks retailers and local specialty shops.

content.title: Order Fresh, Pick Up Locally
content.subtitle: Pre-orders and branch pickup made simple
content.text: Let your customers pre-order rolls, cakes and snacks conveniently — through your own webshop or app.

content.title: The No. 1 in Delivery
content.subtitle: Pizza orders directly through your app
content.text: Pizzerias benefit most from direct orders. Save up to 30% commission per order.

content.title: Asian Food, Your Own Orders
content.subtitle: Sushi, wok & more — ordered direct
content.text: Whether sushi, pad thai or ramen — with your own webshop customers order directly from you.

content.title: Indian Specialities Ordered Direct
content.subtitle: Curry, tandoori & more — commission-free
content.text: Your customers love your food — why should a platform take a cut?

content.title: Burger & Chicken Without Commission
content.subtitle: Fast-food orders direct through you
content.text: Burger restaurants and chicken shops are among the strongest delivery categories. Take back your margin.

content.title: Sweet Orders, Full Profit
content.subtitle: Ice cream, waffles & desserts delivered direct
content.text: Ice cream parlours and dessert shops with delivery are booming. Use your own webshop for pre-orders.

content.title: Bakery With Delivery Service
content.subtitle: Let customers pre-order rolls, cakes & more
content.text: Let customers conveniently pre-order in the morning and deliver fresh — or offer click & collect.

pos.headline: The Gastro Master Cloud POS
pos.sub: TSE-compliant POS software for restaurants, delivery services and hospitality businesses — also available without a webshop or app.
addon1Features: Full transparency in your delivery operation
Ideal for businesses with their own delivery team
pos.addon2Title: Bar System / QR Code Table Ordering
pos.addon2Price: +€50 / month for 5 tables, +€5 per additional table excl. VAT
addon2Features: QR code ordering at the table
Perfect for restaurants with table service
